body:
goodtransgirl:

goodtransgirl:

So, my nesting partner got me some new black and pink gothy panties the other day. I considered making posts to show them off along with my small girl bulge inside, but then I noticed my yearning posts seem to get a lot more attention than my photos. So maybe more folks want to hear what’s in my head than get a peek at me. What do you think my friends?

What do y
reblog_comment: I promised ya’ll something today and it should be up before day’s end. Originally it was gonna be a closeup, which I already have the photo for, but then I thought it might be fun to pose and show them off with a full body shot. There will be no tags and it won’t be shareable, so should mostly only be found by the folks following me or browsing my blog directly, so keep an eye out. ;) And I thought I might add a little extra incentive, my plan is to post one per weekday and I have several pairs to show off, but if I get up to 100 followers before I finish showing them all off, the rest of the posts with poses that allow you to see them, will show off the tatas.

It looks like the ayes have it. I’ll try and have it posted tomorrow morning.
